meta.title: Richard Weitz on the Death of Kim Jong Il for Al Jazeera
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow Richard Weitz joined Al Jazeera to discuss the death of North Korean dictator Kim Jong Il and the ramifications that could come of it.
